name: the generic runner rejects a tool name that is not in the manifest with a usage error
command: printf 'x\n' > f.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool no-such-tool-zzz --file f.txt 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'unknown tool' e.txt && echo unknown-tool-rejected 1>&2
